nasb.text: Everyone who comes near, who comes near to the tabernacle of the Lord, must die. Are we to perish completely?”

esv.text: Everyone who comes near, who comes near to the tabernacle of the Lord, shall die. Are we all to perish?”

cnv.text: 走近耶和華帳幕的，都必定死；難道我們都要死嗎？”

ccb.text: 凡走近耶和华圣幕的都要死，我们岂不是全都要灭亡吗？”
